=== battle-item-trace.lua ===
Captures: OAM (all 64), PPU tile bytes, BG nametable diffs, SFX writes, battle state
SFX writes are also logged OUTSIDE capture (check FCEUX console)

HOW TO USE:
  1. Get into a battle
  2. Open Item menu, select item, pick target
  3. Press P just before confirm
  4. Confirm item use — watch the animation
  5. Press P again to stop (or wait 600 frames)
